nasb.text: So the people took their dough before it was leavened, with their kneading bowls bound up in the clothes on their shoulders.

esv.text: So the people took their dough before it was leavened, their kneading bowls being bound up in their cloaks on their shoulders.

cnv.text: 以色列人就拿了沒有發過酵的生麵，用衣服把摶麵盆綁好，扛在肩頭上。

ccb.text: 于是，以色列百姓就把没有酵的面团放在揉面盆里，用衣服包起来扛在肩上，
